definitions.name: cosmwasm_std_math_uint128_Uint128

cap.description:
cap is a hard cap on total supply that can be achieved by minting.
Note that this refers to total_supply.
If None, there is unlimited cap.

definitions.name: cw20_logo_Logo
definitions.description: This is used for uploading logo data, or setting it in InstantiateData

embedded.description: Logo content stored on the blockchain. Enforce maximum size of 5KB on all variants

url.description: A reference to an externally hosted logo. Must be a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.

definitions.name: cw20_logo_EmbeddedLogo
definitions.description:
This is used to store the logo on the blockchain in an accepted format.
Enforce maximum size of 5KB on all variants.

png.description:
Store the Logo as a PNG file. This will likely only support up to 64x64 or so
within the 5KB limit.

svg.description:
Store the Logo as an SVG file. The content must conform to the spec
at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Scalable_Vector_Graphics
(The contract should do some light-weight sanity-check validation)

definitions.name: cosmwasm_std_binary_Binary
definitions.description:
Binary is a wrapper around Vec<u8> to add base64 de/serialization
with serde. It also adds some helper methods to help encode inline.

This is only needed as serde-json-{core,wasm} has a horrible encoding for Vec<u8>.
See also <https://github.com/CosmWasm/cosmwasm/blob/main/docs/MESSAGE_TYPES.md>.
